summary:
There is currently no established link between rare variants in PPARG and type 1 diabetes based on available literature. The known major genetic factors for Type 1 Diabetes involve HLA regions, particularly DR/DQ haplotypes, with little reported association of PPARG variants in this context.

Final Answer: No
The provided summary focuses only on the essential clinical aspects related to the query about PPARG and type 1 diabetes without including irrelevant details such as general genetics background beyond what pertains directly to the specific gene-disease relationship being asked.
